summary.lv: Latvijas Mobilais Telefons meklē IT pakalpojumu tehniskā atbalsta speciālistu/-i klientu atbalstam, incidentu pārvaldībai un IT pakalpojumu uzturēšanai.
summary.en: LMT is looking for an IT Service Support Specialist to provide technical support to existing and potential clients, handle incidents per SLA, and maintain documentation.
